name: Marco Lanfranchi
hero_description: Incoming Data Scientist I at Mastercard. Experience with database engineering, software development, and data science.

education.description: Relevant courses include: Data Structures & Algorithms, Computational Data Science, Database Systems, Computer Systems, Intro to AI, Linear Algebra, Statistical Learning & Prediction, Linear Optimization, and Discrete Mathematics.

jobs.title: Data Scientist I
jobs.description: Post-grad role working on ML infrastructure.

jobs.title: Data Analyst Intern
jobs.description: Developed dashboards, data pipelines, and applied data science techniques analyzing global streaming data for hundreds of artists as part of the Analytics team at an independent record label.

opensource.title: Streamlit
opensource.description: Contributed to Streamlit, a popular open-source framework for building data and ML apps, by implementing tooltip support for st.badge().

volunteering.title: Volunteer Jr. Data Scientist
volunteering.description: Contributed to the development of data applications for business clients, developing interactive visualizations with Python and JavaScript.

volunteering.title: Research Associate
volunteering.company: Dr. Matt Lowe, UBC School of Economics
volunteering.description: Collaborated as an undergraduate research associate collecting data for one of Dr. Matt Lowe's research studies in behavioral economics.

projects.title: lisa (Labeled Identification of Speech Audio)
projects.description: ML model for speaker identification from audio clips. Pipeline includes data processing, audio cleaning, feature extraction, and model training. Also developed a demo interface that takes live audio input and identifies speakers.

projects.title: spotify-history
projects.description: Automated background service that archives your Spotify listening history in an SQLite db and emails daily summaries.

projects.title: iammusic-template
projects.description: Web app that lets users create custom versions of the 'I AM MUSIC' album cover. Reached over 250k visitors in one month and processed 500k+ submissions via a custom API and NoSQL cloud database.

projects.title: written-digit-recognition
projects.description: Interactive Streamlit app for handwritten digit classification, backed by a K-nearest neighbors model implemented from scratch in Python.

projects.title: aita-predictor
projects.description: A machine learning model that classifies r/AmItheA-hole Reddit posts using an ensemble of classifiers built on vector embeddings and large-scale PySpark text processing.

zines.title: Cypherpunks: The Origins of Digital Resistance
zines.description: A zine about the origins of the cypherpunk movement. Made as part of SFU's PUB 448 course.
